options.name: --all
options.description: If set, all possible permutations of scope parameters are build in nested folders.

options.name: --export-config-file
options.description: If set, summary config file is generated.

options.name: --no-output
options.description: If set, output files produced by configuration are not written to the disk.

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Output base path. Can be relative to the input vars file.

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch and recompile if any source file has changed.
